name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Access Events
notes: Edit this Building Block to include all object (file, folder, etc) access related event categories.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Access Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.File Access Attempt, Audit.File Access Failure, Audit.File Access Success, Audit.Object Access Attempt, Audit.Object Access Failure, Audit.Object Access Success
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Access Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.File Access Attempt, Audit.File Access Failure, Audit.File Access Success, Audit.Object Access Attempt, Audit.Object Access Failure, Audit.Object Access Success
